center.name: 巴西兰省
center.summary: 巴西兰省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联6种鸟类，包括Pinsker's hawk-eagle、棉岛犀鸟、Southern silvery kingfisher等6种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: |name-list-style=amp |title=A possible new subspecies of the Philippine Hawk-eagle (Spizaetus philippensis) and its future prospects.}} It is endemic to the Philippines native to the islands of Leyte, Samar, Negros, Basilan, Bohol and Mindanao

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The southern silvery kingfisher (Ceyx argentatus) is a species of bird in the family Alcedinidae that is endemic to the Philippines found in Mindanao and Basilan

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: obscurior | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | genus = Orthotomus | species = cinereiceps | authority = Sharpe, 1877 | synonyms = }} The white-eared tailorbird (Orthotomus cinereiceps) is a species of bird formerly placed in the "Old World warbler" assemblage, it but now placed in the family Cisticolidae.It is found in the Philippine islands of Basilan and West Mindanao

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Mindanao hornbill (Penelopides affinis), also known as the Mindanao tarictic hornbill, is a medium-small species of hornbill found in the canopy of rainforests on Mindanao, Dinagat, Siargao and Basilan in the southern Philippines

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is native to the southern Philippines on the islands of Mindanao and Dinagat Islands and Basilan

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: melanarus in Quezon; North Philippine dwarf kingfisher | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | genus = Ceyx | species = melanurus | authority = (Kaup, 1848) }} The Philippine dwarf kingfisher (Ceyx melanurus) is a species of bird in the family Alcedinidae that is endemic to the Philippines found in the islands of Luzon, Polillo Islands, Catanduanes, Basilan, Samar, Leyte and Mindanao
